pi_items.source: Task description requires zone name to be exactly 'Continental US'
WooCommerce uses ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes; US is the standard code for United States (https://woocommerce.com/document/setting-up-shipping-zones/)
WooCommerce uses 'flat_rate' as the method_id for flat rate shipping methods (https://woocommerce.github.io/code-reference/classes/WC-Shipping-Flat-Rate.html)
Task description specifies cost must be exactly 8.50 (no dollar sign in the field); this is stored as a string in WooCommerce wp_options
Alternative decimal format for 8.50; both formats represent the same monetary value and WooCommerce verifier accepts both (see verifier.py line 83)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring a WooCommerce shipping zone with specific parameters: zone name 'Continental US', region code 'US' (the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for United States), shipping method 'flat_rate' (WooCommerce's standard method identifier for flat rate shipping), and cost '8.50' (or alternative '8.5'). All metadata claims are accurate and correspond to WooCommerce's standard configuration and database storage conventions.
